name: workflow state transition is logged to the merkle-chained audit log as a structured event
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/transition.sh" --to plan --audit-log compliance/audit.log --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"event":"workflow-transition"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"to":"plan"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
